name: Parmesan Prawns
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and butterfly the prawns. Season with salt, Worcestershire sauce, and lemon juice.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese.
3. Dip the seasoned prawns into the DIPPING BATTER and roll them in the breadcrumb/cheese mixture.
4. Deep fry at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 2 minutes until golden brown.
